page_content: ENTS635 Decision Support Methods for Telecommunication Managers (3 Credits) The aim of this course is to introduce management science techniques for informed decision making. Topics covered can include data analysis and regression, optimization models and applications (workforce scheduling, manufacturing, network design, facility location), sensitivity analysis, decision trees, risk analysis and business simulation models. Emphasis will be on telecommunications managerial problems, model development and the use of software packages for decision support. Restriction: Must be in Telecommunications (Master's) program.
